headline: Block (SQ) Is Up 6.8% After Analyst Upgrade And New Square Enterprise Win - What's Changed
summary: On 27 June 2026, Block, Inc. was removed from several Russell growth benchmarks, while earlier in the month Ladurée Canada announced it had selected Square as its exclusive commerce platform across all Canadian locations, expanding Square’s role across multiple store formats and channels. Together with a recent analyst upgrade highlighting Block within the payments sector, these developments spotlight how index status, client adoption, and external views can influence how investors assess...

headline: Block (XYZ) Lands Ladurée Deal After Russell Growth Exit And Analyst Upgrade
summary: Block (NYSE:XYZ) was removed from several Russell Growth indices, affecting its presence in key equity benchmarks. The company secured a new partnership with Ladurée Canada to power payments and commerce operations across the chain. Piper Sandler raised its rating on Block shares to Overweight, reflecting a shift in analyst stance on the stock. Block enters this phase with a mixed backdrop for investors.
